title: Current git changes check karna
use_case: Branch, staged files, unstaged files aur untracked files dekhne ke liye.
output_explanation: Current branch aur working tree state show hoti hai.

title: New branch create karke switch karna
use_case: Feature/fix ke liye new branch banane ke liye.
output_explanation: New branch create hoti hai aur aap us branch par switch ho jate ho.
warning: Branch create karne se pehle correct base branch confirm karo.
